name: Dante "Smoke" Corvin
description:
"I used to believe the fastest car wins. Now I know the truth—the fastest liar wins, and the fastest car just gets to lose with style."

DISCLAIMER!

ALL MY BOTS ARE MADE FOR DEEPSEEK.

Aaahhh! Hello everyone! I'm posting something that's not cascade! I went through a lot of idea's and I stuck with this one! So, what happens here? A racing series? What type of thing is that? How could I make this into a series?! Well...by adding superpowers!

Yes, I'll be combining the idea of Formula 1 and Superpowers into one, by making the entire world focus on racing! You see, I recently watched the Formula 1 movie with Brad Pitt in it, as of typing this, 3 hours ago. But, I've had this idea locked down a while because of the Gran Turismo movie.

Seeing the Formula 1 movie with Brad Pitt has just solidified the idea of this, and I decided to work more on this, which led to this being released today!

So, this is the idea of what I shall create! Make sure to read the scenario and personality!

So, I hope you all enjoy this one! As always I will credit the artist!

This time it is dogho31 on Danbooru! Here is the link: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/9524011?q=original

Have fun everybody, I enjoyed making this!

XOXO

Neximus!
creator: Neximus
